errors.P_NETWORK: Network error — check your connection and try again
errors.P_5XX: Provider returned a server error (5xx) — retry in a moment
errors.P_429: Rate limited by provider — waiting before retry
errors.P_AUTH: Authentication failed — check your API key with `nimbus key set`
errors.P_INVALID_REQUEST: Invalid request sent to provider — this is a bug, please report it
errors.P_CONTEXT_OVERFLOW: Context window exceeded — consider compacting the session
errors.P_MODEL_NOT_FOUND: Model not found — run `nimbus key set --model` to pick a valid model
errors.T_TIMEOUT: Tool timed out — the operation took too long
errors.T_PERMISSION: Permission denied — {tool} is not allowed in this mode
errors.T_ITERATION_CAP: Agent reached the maximum iteration limit ({limit})
errors.X_PATH_BLOCKED: Path access blocked by security policy — {path}
errors.X_NETWORK_BLOCKED: Network access blocked by security policy — {host}
errors.X_AUDIT_BREAK: Audit chain tampered — session integrity compromised
errors.U_MISSING_CONFIG: Missing config — run `nimbus init` to set up your workspace
errors.Y_OOM: Out of memory — free up RAM and try again
errors.Y_DISK_FULL: Disk full — free up space and try again
errors.Y_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_OPEN: Circuit breaker open — too many errors, pausing for {seconds}s
permissions.mode.readonly: Read-only — no writes or shell commands
permissions.mode.default: Default — safe tools allowed, destructive require confirmation
permissions.mode.bypass: Bypass — all tools allowed without confirmation
permissions.mode.plan: Plan — agent proposes steps, you approve each one
permissions.mode.auto: Auto — agent acts autonomously within configured rules
permissions.mode.isolated: Isolated — sandboxed workspace, no network or fs access
cost.free_estimate: Cost estimate unavailable for this provider
init.invalid_name: Invalid workspace name — use lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only
repl.iteration_limit: Reached iteration limit ({limit}) — continuing requires confirmation
key.none: No keys configured — run `nimbus key set`
